evals.name: text-extraction
evals.prompt: I have a screenshot of an error message at ./test_images/error_screenshot.png. Can you extract all the text from it so I can copy it into a bug report?
evals.expected_output: Extracted text from the error message screenshot

evals.name: chart-analysis
evals.prompt: Can you look at this chart and tell me what trends you see? ./test_images/sales_chart.png
evals.expected_output: Description of chart type, data points, and trends

evals.name: receipt-extraction
evals.prompt: I need to digitize this receipt. It's saved as ./test_images/receipt.png. Extract the merchant name, date, all line items with prices, and the total.
evals.expected_output: Structured data: merchant, date, line items, total
